title: New Position: Adjunct Researcher at the University of Tokyo
summary: Dr. Enrique Coronado has been appointed Adjunct Researcher at GVLab, The University of Tokyo — a part-time role complementing his position as Senior Researcher at AIST HEART.
body: This appointment strengthens the collaboration between AIST HEART and GVLab at the University of Tokyo, fostering joint research on responsible physical and agentic AI.

The role bridges national-institute and university research, connecting industrial-scale AI infrastructure with academic training and mentorship, and expanding opportunities for students and early-career researchers across both institutions.
